coordinate_system: Tschamut LPS local horizontal coordinates; elevations are EnviDat LPS terrain heights shifted by -1600 m for consistency with overview data.

terrain_proxy.note: This is a transparent terrain proxy built from public LPS ground points by adding inverse-distance-weighted residuals to a fitted trend plane. It is not an official field DEM and must not be interpreted as calibrated terrain reconstruction.
terrain_proxy.trend_equation: z_trend_m = slope_x * x_m + slope_y * y_m + intercept_m
